flow.name: shipment-confirmation-orchestration-flow

ee:transform.doc:name: Parse Inbound Message and Set Working Vars

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- attributes.messageId default payload.messageId default uuid()

logger.doc:name: Log Receipt
logger.message: #[ "Received shipment confirmation for shipmentId=" ++ (payload.shipment.shipmentId as String) ++ ", orderNumber=" ++ (payload.order.orderNumber as String) ++ ", correlationId=" ++ vars.correlationId ]

ee:transform.doc:name: Transform Shipment to SAP Delivery Posting Request

flow.choice:
<when expression="#[attributes.statusCode >= 200 and attributes.statusCode < 300]">
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload
%dw 2.0 output application/java var sap = vars.sapResponse --- { OrderNumber__c: sap.salesOrderNumber default null, SAP_Delivery_Document__c: sap.deliveryDocumentNumber default null, SAP_Material_Document__c: sap.materialDocumentNumber default null, Shipment_Status__c: if ((sap.overallStatus default "") as String == "POSTED") "Fulfilled" else if ((sap.overallStatus default "") as String == "PARTIAL") "Partially Fulfilled" else "ERP Processing", Actual_Ship_Date__c: sap.postingDate default null, Carrier_Tracking_Number__c: sap.trackingNumber default null, Warehouse_Confirmation_Id__c: sap.externalReference default null, ERP_Response_Code__c: sap.responseCode default "UNKNOWN", ERP_Response_Message__c: ((sap.messages default []) map $.message) joinBy "; ", Last_Integrated_At__c: now() as String }
%dw 2.0 output application/json var sap = vars.sapResponse --- { eventType: "ShipmentFulfillmentCompleted", eventVersion: "1.0", eventTime: now(), correlationId: vars.correlationId, sourceSystem: "mulesoft", businessDomain: "order-fulfillment", shipment: { shipmentId: sap.externalReference, salesOrderNumber: sap.salesOrderNumber, sapDeliveryDocumentNumber: sap.deliveryDocumentNumber, sapMaterialDocumentNumber: sap.materialDocumentNumber, postingDate: sap.postingDate }, customer: { erpCustomerNumber: sap.soldToParty default null }, integrationOutcome: { sapStatus: sap.overallStatus default "UNKNOWN", salesforceUpdated: true, completedAt: now() }, summaryMessage: "Shipment " ++ (sap.externalReference as String) ++ " for sales order " ++ (sap.salesOrderNumber as String) ++ " was posted to SAP, synchronized to Salesforce, and completed successfully." }

logger.doc:name: Log Orchestration Error
logger.message: #[ "Shipment orchestration failed for correlationId=" ++ (vars.correlationId default "unknown") ++ ". Error: " ++ error.description ]
